name: Devara

skills.name: Wish of the Living
skills.description: Devara's Basic Attacks grant Energy. Becomes enhanced and gains another basic skill chance upon reaching the limit.

skills.name: Thunderblaze
skills.description: Dashes forward, dealing damage to enemies in his path while gaining a shield.

skills.name: Divine Judgment
skills.description: Knocks back and damages enemies in front of him.

skills.name: Millennium Echo
skills.description: Gains crowd control immunity and a Movement Speed boost. Upon landing, enhances Basic Attack. Basic Attacks grant Energy.

skillsZh.name: 眾生之願
skillsZh.description: 諦梵羅普攻可獲得能量，達到上限後獲得強化，並額外獲得一次基礎技能機會。

skillsZh.name: 薪火雷馳
skillsZh.description: 諦梵羅向前位移，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害並獲得護盾。

skillsZh.name: 諦聽神罰
skillsZh.description: 諦梵羅擊退前方敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 千年迴響
skillsZh.description: 諦梵羅獲得霸體和加速，落地後強化普攻，每次普攻增加獲得的能量。

tipsZh: 諦梵羅（對抗路）：梯度 A，勝率 46.48%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：逐風、末世、寒霜襲侵.

faqs.question: Is Devara good in current season?
faqs.answer: Devara is Tier A Mage with 46.48% win rate, 1.12% pick rate, and 0.23% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Devara build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Tempest, Doomsday, Deepfrost Siege, Sunchaser, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Devara?
faqs.answer: Pick Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Strong into Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.

faqsZh.question: 諦梵羅 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 諦梵羅 為 A 梯度，勝率 46.48%、選取 1.12%、禁用 0.23%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 諦梵羅 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：逐風、末世、寒霜襲侵、逐日之弓、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 諦梵羅？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。諦梵羅 克制 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Weak into: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable；被克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable
